title: What happened between Trevv and ChudTheBuilder? Nashville confrontation turns into aggravated robbery controversy
summary_full: ChudTheBuilder and Trevv’s online feud exploded after Trevv stole ChudTheBuilder’s hat during a public Nashville encounter on May 10, 2026. The situation quickly turned serious after accusations of aggravated robbery, weapon claims, and FBI comments surfaced online. Despite multiple viral posts and livestream reactions from both creators, no arrests or confirmed investigations have been publicly reported so far.
